title: ceanothus ovalis var. intermedius
intro: Ceanothus ovalis var. intermedius, also known as the intermediate mountain whitethorn, is a shrub species in the Rhamnaceae family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ceanothus ovalis var. intermedius include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves, bark, and roots are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
